case_title: BOB RAGO VS. PEACOCK INTERIORS & GALLERY INC.

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT RAGO, BOB IND/DBA FIREGUARD ENTERPRISES INC. AS TO RESPONDENT PEACOCK INTERIORS & GALLERY INC. HEARING SET FOR DEC-12-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: RECOVER FROM APPELLANT RAGO, BOB IND/DBA FIREGUARD ENTERPRISES INC. $1,748.68 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,818.68, ,ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM:JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF PEACOCK AND AGAINST DEFENDANT FIREGUARD, AND DEFENDANT SHALL TAKE NOTHING NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
APPEAL RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIM DIVISION.
